name: @chbrain/khai-engine-language
description: khai engine content, the language domain: language as process, the gap a persona crosses channel by channel, width by width.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Language as process: a persona moves meaning across the gap, and what is heard is not what is understood, what is understood is not what is said.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_using_language.md) declares language as a loop a persona runs whenever they are awake: meaning moves out, moves in, or stays inside, and the gap between what is meant and what the language gives is recorded per channel.
card.issue: Five channels, each its own loop. Speaking and writing carry meaning out; hearing and reading let it in; thinking runs underneath, never reaching the room. Each input or output channel runs across four widths, from a language gripped as a foreign object up to one that needs no grip because it is the body; thinking runs only the two deepest. One channel may sit at a different width than another in the same language; widths do not move together.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root, so the ladder reads system-wide and no persona escapes it. The link: each persona carries, under Projection, the languages it holds, linking the channel and the width it occupies in each.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; the read is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links real ladder files at declared widths. Whether a width is true to the persona is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The agent does not narrate widths; the width shows in what the persona manages and what they miss.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give each persona its read under Projection: for each language it holds, link the channel ladder files at the widths it occupies. Under pressure a persona slides toward the width they hold most firmly, regardless of the room. Read it in the first beat; the room enacts the loss, never narrates it.
